name: Flyfang
desc: If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage. If this card inflicted battle damage to your opponent, at the end of the Battle Phase: Banish this card until your next Standby Phase.
mnst_eff: If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage. If this card inflicted battle damage to your opponent, at the end of the Battle Phase: Banish this card until your next Standby Phase.
eff: If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage. If this card inflicted battle damage to your opponent, at the end of the Battle Phase: Banish this card until your next Standby Phase.

sets.set: Speed Duel: Streets of Battle City

action: Returns itself to field while banished
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
